SourceProxy.name: CurbDetector
SourceProxy.label: Curb Detector

Documentation.short_help: Detect curb edges (left/right) within a 3D ROI.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Extracts curb points in real-time from a LiDAR point cloud within a 3D region of interest. It detects the left and right curb edges inside the ROI.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ZChangeMin
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Minimum Z Change (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum average ΔZ per neighbor pair along X (meters).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: RansacDistanceThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: RANSAC Inlier Distance (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum point-to-line distance for inliers during RANSAC (meters).

IntVectorProperty.name: NeighborCount
IntVectorProperty.label: Neighbors Per Side
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of neighbors on each side used to compute the Z-change window.
